nodes.label: Ritual Onboarding — Duration selector + app blocking setup (30 min selected)
nodes.description: Onboarding/session-start screen welcoming user Juan. Header shows 'PRINCIPIO MENTEX' label with quote card: 'La atención es el recurso más escaso del siglo XXI / Cada minuto sin distraerte es una inversión a interés compuesto'. Greeting: 'Buenas tardes, Juan, ¿Listo para tu ritual de hoy?' with subtext about choosing apps to silence and routines to build. Duration selector row: 15 min | 30 min (selected, neon highlight) | 45 min | 1 hora. Section 'Mejora tu concentración' listing apps to block: Instagram (Red social), TikTok (Videos cortos), YouTube (Videos), X (Red social) — all with toggle switches. Primary CTA button centered: 'Comenzar jornada · 30 min' (neon green). Mentex Tweaks panel visible. Bottom nav present.
ui_elements: Quote card with Mentex principle about attention
Duration selector: 15 min | 30 min | 45 min | 1 hora (30 min selected/highlighted)
App block list: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X with category labels and toggle switches
CTA button centered: 'Comenzar jornada · 30 min' (neon green, full-width)
nodes.app_state: Ritual onboarding, 30 min duration selected, apps list shown for blocking, session not yet started
nodes.ui_pattern: Duration pill selector — 30 min neon-highlighted; CTA button centered below app list

edges.description: Ritual onboarding (duration selector + app blocking) is the entry point that transitions into the Home screen showing active protection mode and ritual progress.
